sentences.arabic: تَنْظِيمُ الْوَقْتِ ضَرُورِيٌّ لِزِيَادَةِ الْإِنْتَاجِيَّةِ فِي الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Organizacija vremena je neophodna za povećanje produktivnosti na poslu.
sentences.translationEn: Time management is necessary to increase productivity at work.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ خَالِدٌ جَدْوَلًا يَوْمِيًّا لِتَرْتِيبِ مَوَاعِيدِهِ.
sentences.translation: Khalid koristi dnevni raspored kako bi organizovao svoje termine.
sentences.translationEn: Khalid uses a daily schedule to organize his appointments.

sentences.arabic: يَبْتَعِدُ عَنِ الْهَاتِفِ لِيُرَكِّزَ عَلَى مَشَارِيعِهِ الْهَامَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Udaljava se od telefona kako bi se fokusirao na svoje važne projekte.
sentences.translationEn: He stays away from the phone to focus on his important projects.

sentences.arabic: بِهَذِهِ الطَّرِيقَةِ، يُحَقِّقُ نَتَائِجَ مُمْتَازَةً كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Na taj način svakodnevno postiže odlične rezultate.
sentences.translationEn: In this way, he achieves excellent results every day.
